logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'i2c_val' will not be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_rack' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_rreq' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_wack' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_wreq' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_dout' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_din' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_addr' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'auto_inc_regad_in' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'dev_addr_in' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'i2c_sda_oe' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'i2c_sda_out' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'i2c_in' will be exposed as RTL port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_rreq' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_wreq' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_dout' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_addr' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'i2c_sda_oe' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'i2c_sda_out' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [XFORM 203-562] Loop 'Loop-1.21.1' (i2c_slave_core.c:314) in function 'i2c_slave_core' has unknown bound because it has multiple exiting blocks.
